excerpt: Visitors and intruders at a remote lakeside estate suffer graphic, over-the-top fates at the hands of otherworldly forces.
title: Red Spirit Lake

excerpt: A psychiatrist insinuates himself into the life of a race car driver struggling with murderous urges toward his wife.
title: Stop Me Before I Kill!

excerpt: Cynical reporter William Holden finds the leak plaguing his childhood friend’s attempt to build a case against a crime syndicate, but grapples with the implications of revealing it.
title: The Turning Point

excerpt: A pair of New York cops hunt a killer stalking Manhattan massage parlors.
title: Massage Parlor Murders!

excerpt: Corey Haim falls for an attractive young blonde who wants him to help her kill her father.
title: Blown Away
